title: wolfhsm crypto: ECC P-256 (ecc.rs)
description: Implement EccP256Key{id:KeyId} with generate, load(label), commit(label), evict, public_key_der (-> DER SubjectPublicKeyInfo), sign_digest (-> DER ECDSA sig via wolfhsm_ecc_sign shim), verify_digest, ecdh (-> shared secret bytes), signer() -> EccP256Signer. Implement EccP256Signer<'a> with signature::Signer<p256::ecdsa::DerSignature>: hash msg with SHA-256 in Rust, call sign_digest for the HSM operation.
